name: James Gunn

films.title: Slither
films.overview: A small town is taken over by an alien plague, turning residents into zombies and all forms of mutant monsters.

films.title: Super
films.overview: After his wife falls under the influence of a drug dealer, an everyday guy transforms himself into Crimson Bolt, a superhero with the best intentions, though he lacks for heroic skills.

films.title: Movie 43
films.overview: A series of interconnected short films are the backdrop for a maniac screenwriter who pitches insane storylines featuring some of Hollywood's biggest and brightest.  In some countries, like the United Kingdom and the Netherlands, the structure differs. Instead of a pitch, the films are connected by a group of three teenagers searching for the most banned film in the world, Movie 43, which will ultimately lead to the destruction of civilization.

films.title: Superman
films.overview: Superman, a journalist in Metropolis, embarks on a journey to reconcile his Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as Clark Kent.

films.title: The Suicide Squad
films.overview: Supervillains Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker and a collection of nutty cons at Belle Reve prison join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X as they are dropped off at the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.

films.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
films.overview: Peter Quill, still reeling from the loss of Gamora, must rally his team around him to defend the universe along with protecting one of their own. A mission that, if not completed successfully, could quite possibly lead to the end of the Guardians as we know them.

films.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
films.overview: Light years from Earth, 26 years after being abducted, Peter Quill finds himself the prime target of a manhunt after discovering an orb wanted by Ronan the Accuser.

films.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
films.overview: The Guardians must fight to keep their newfound family together as they unravel the mysteries of Peter Quill's true parentage.

films.title: The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
films.overview: On a mission to make Christmas unforgettable for Quill, the Guardians head to Earth in search of the perfect present.

known_for: The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
